requirements.summary: Remove the delete button and delete functionality from the ProductCard component so public users cannot delete products from the catalog view
acceptanceCriteria: ProductCard component no longer displays a delete button
Public users cannot trigger product deletion from the catalog page
Admin users can still delete products through the SnackManagement admin page

file_operations.description: Remove the delete button, delete confirmation dialog, and all associated delete functionality from the ProductCard component. Keep the image, name, description, price display, and the 'View Details' button intact. This ensures public users viewing the catalog cannot delete products while maintaining all other product browsing capabilities.

requirements.summary: Remove the delete button and delete functionality from the ProductDetail page so public users cannot delete products from the detail view
acceptanceCriteria: ProductDetail page does not display a delete button
Public users cannot trigger product deletion from the product detail page
Admin users retain delete capability through the SnackManagement admin page

file_operations.description: Remove the delete button and all associated delete functionality from the ProductDetail page. Preserve the product image, description, price display, quantity selector, and add-to-cart functionality. This restricts product deletion to the admin-only SnackManagement page while keeping all product viewing and cart features available to public users.
